Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-09-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Giselle Casey, CSR 8098. Telephone: 415-717-9768.

Bryana McGuirk, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Monji Troudi, who was not present at today's hearing, and with plaintiff Arif Alenizy, who was placed under oath and testified.
No Appearance by defaulted defendant Luis Mora.
Default was entered against defendant on September 22, 2017.
Doe defendants were dismissed on September 22, 2017.
Dismissal with prejudice filed September 12, 2016 as to defendant Manuel Gonzalez.
The Court GRANTS counsel's request to amend plaintiff's to delete Desoto Cab Company, Inc. as a plaintiff in the present action.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Monji Troudi & Arif Alenizy, and against the Defaulted Defendant Luis Mora, as follows:

PLAINTIFF ARIF ALENIZY:
Damages/Principal - $14,572.09.
Costs - $327.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $14,899.09.

PLAINTIFF MONJI TROUDI:
Damages/Principal - $25,000.00.
Costs - $327.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $25,327.00.

Counsel for plaintiffs shall prepare the Proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.
